name: type: bug
description: Confirmed or reported incorrect behavior

name: type: feature
description: New capability or public API proposal

name: type: performance
description: Speed, memory, allocation, or bundle-size work

name: type: documentation
description: Documentation content or examples

name: type: question
description: Usage or design question

name: type: maintenance
description: Dependencies, tooling, release, or repository upkeep

name: area: schemas
description: Schema AST, builders, inference, and transforms

name: area: compiler
description: IR, optimization, generated source, and validators

name: area: runtime
description: Runtime JIT, caches, indexes, and execution

name: area: aot
description: AOT discovery, generation, types, and tree shaking

name: area: cli
description: CLI commands, configuration, and developer experience

name: area: query
description: Queries, lazy execution, and collection operations

name: area: binary
description: Binary codecs, rowsets, layouts, and streaming

name: area: mcp
description: MCP server and agent integrations

name: area: docs
description: Guides, API reference, examples, and website content

name: area: site
description: Documentation website and playground

name: area: ci
description: Continuous integration and release automation

name: status: needs-triage
description: Needs maintainer classification and validation

name: status: confirmed
description: Reproduced or accepted by a maintainer

name: status: blocked
description: Cannot progress until a dependency or decision changes

name: status: ready
description: Scoped and ready for implementation

name: priority: p0
description: Release blocker, security issue, or severe data corruption

name: priority: p1
description: High-impact regression or near-term requirement

name: priority: p2
description: Normal planned work

name: priority: p3
description: Useful improvement without urgency

name: breaking change
description: Changes a public API, type contract, or wire format

name: good first issue
description: Well-scoped entry point for a new contributor

name: help wanted
description: Maintainers welcome community implementation help

name: dependencies
description: Dependency updates and supply-chain maintenance

name: needs benchmark
description: Requires reproducible speed or memory evidence

name: needs reproduction
description: Requires a minimal executable reproduction

name: duplicate
description: Already tracked by another issue or pull request

name: wontfix
description: Not planned under the current project direction
